name: MAS Gold Corp.
summary: MAS Gold Corp., an exploration stage company, engages in the exploration and development of exploration and evaluation properties in Canada. It primarily explores for gold deposits. The company holds 6 mineral properties covering an area of 53,614 hectares comprises 68 mineral dispositions located in the La Ronge gold belt. It principally holds interests in the Greywacke, Preview Lake, North Lake, and Elizabeth Lake properties located in La Ronge gold belt, Saskatchewan. The company was formerly known as Masuparia Gold Corporation and changed its name to MAS Gold Corp. in April 2018. MAS Gold Corp. was incorporated in 1981 and is based in Vancouver, Canada.
